endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/authorizedCertificates
endpoints.description: Lists all SSL certificates the user is authorized to administer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/authorizedCertificates
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/authorizedCertificates/{authorizedCertificatesId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTHORIZEDCERTIFICATESID}} with a real authorizedcertificatesid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/authorizedCertificates/{authorizedCertificatesId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTHORIZEDCERTIFICATESID}} with a real authorizedcertificatesid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/authorizedCertificates/{authorizedCertificatesId}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified SSL certificate. To renew a certificate and maintain its existing domain mappings, update certificate_data with a new certificate. The new certificate must be applicable to the same domains as the original certificate. The certificate display_name may also be updated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTHORIZEDCERTIFICATESID}} with a real authorizedcertificatesid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/authorizedDomains
endpoints.description: Lists all domains the user is authorized to administer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/domainMappings
endpoints.description: Lists the domain mappings on an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/domainMappings
endpoints.description: Maps a domain to an application. A user must be authorized to administer a domain in order to map it to an application. For a list of available authorized domains, see AuthorizedDomains.ListAuthorizedDomains.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/domainMappings/{domainMappingsId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DOMAINMAPPINGSID}} with a real domainmappingsid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/domainMappings/{domainMappingsId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified domain mapping. A user must be authorized to administer the associated domain in order to delete a DomainMapping resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DOMAINMAPPINGSID}} with a real domainmappingsid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/domainMappings/{domainMappingsId}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified domain mapping. To map an SSL certificate to a domain mapping, update certificate_id to point to an AuthorizedCertificate resource. A user must be authorized to administer the associated domain in order to update a DomainMapping resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DOMAINMAPPINGSID}} with a real domainmappingsid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/locations/{locationsId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATIONSID}} with a real locationsid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/operations
endpoints.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns UNIMPLEMENTED.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/apps/{appsId}/operations/{operationsId}
endpoints.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONSID}} with a real operationsid. Replace {{APPSID}} with a real appsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/projects/{projectsId}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTSID}} with a real projectsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTSID}} with a real projectsid. Replace {{LOCATIONSID}} with a real locationsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/operations
endpoints.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns UNIMPLEMENTED.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTSID}} with a real projectsid. Replace {{LOCATIONSID}} with a real locationsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/operations/{operationsId}
endpoints.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTSID}} with a real projectsid. Replace {{OPERATIONSID}} with a real operationsid. Replace {{LOCATIONSID}} with a real locationsid.
